title: new-screening-run

metadata.project_topic: BALF基线病毒谱经免疫调控影响SCAP患者预后的机制及预测研究

records.title: Clinical characteristics and prognosis of patients with Chlamydia psittaci pneumonia identified by metagenomic next-generation sequencing.
records.reason: 标题和摘要聚焦鹦鹉热衣原体肺炎，未涉及筛选主题要求的病毒谱、免疫调控或预后预测模型。

records.title: Targeted next-generation sequencing improves diagnosis and antimicrobial stewardship in Chlamydia psittaci pneumonia.
records.reason: 研究针对鹦鹉热衣原体肺炎的tNGS诊断和抗生素管理，未涉及病毒谱、免疫调控机制或预后预测。
records.journal: Eur J Clin Microbiol Infect Dis

records.title: Clinical characterization of Chlamydia psittaci infections detected by targeted next generation sequencing in a Chinese tertiary hospital.
records.reason: 研究描述鹦鹉热衣原体感染的tNGS检测，虽提及IL-6但非核心机制探讨，未涉及病毒谱或预后预测模型。

records.title: Clinical characteristics and prognostic impact of streptococcal colonization in critically ill patients with severe pneumonia.
records.reason: 研究涉及重症肺炎患者链球菌定植与预后，使用BALF mNGS并分析死亡率，但未明确涉及病毒谱或免疫调控机制。

records.title: The role of bronchoalveolar lavage fluid metagenomic next-generation sequencing in detecting pathogens and optimising antibiotic therapy in paediatric severe community-acquired pneumonia.
records.reason: 标题和摘要明确针对儿童重症社区获得性肺炎，使用BALF mNGS优化抗生素治疗并分析临床结局，符合纳入标准。

records.title: Airway microbiome dysbiosis in severe pneumonia: metagenomic evidence of pathogen expansion and commensal depletion.
records.reason: 研究涉及重症肺炎的BALF mNGS微生物组分析，关联炎症和凝血指标，但未明确讨论病毒谱或免疫调控机制。

records.title: Aspergillus fumigatus in mechanically ventilated pneumonia- independent mortality risk and synergistic microbiome signatures from a multicenter mNGS cohort.
records.reason: 研究涉及机械通气重症肺炎的BALF mNGS，分析烟曲霉感染与死亡率风险，并提及EBV等病毒共定植，符合纳入标准。

records.title: The impact of the timing of mNGS-guided antibiotic adjustment on clinical outcomes in ICU patients with severe community-acquired pneumonia: a retrospective study.
records.reason: 标题和摘要明确针对重症社区获得性肺炎，使用BALF mNGS指导抗生素调整并分析28天死亡率，符合纳入标准。

records.title: Targeted next-generation sequencing has comparable clinical value to metagenomic NGS for pulmonary infections in hematological malignancy patients: a real-world propensity score-matched study.
records.reason: 研究比较血液病患者的BALF tNGS与mNGS诊断价值，未涉及重症肺炎、病毒谱、免疫调控或预后预测。

records.title: CD4(+) T cells stratification unveils a dynamic pathogen landscape in severe pneumonia: a targeted next-generation sequencing-based cohort study.
records.reason: 研究涉及重症肺炎的BALF tNGS病原谱分析，以CD4+ T细胞分层关联CMV等病毒感染和预后，符合纳入标准。

project_topic: BALF基线病毒谱经免疫调控影响SCAP患者预后的机制及预测研究
